tournaments.title: Roland Garros
tournaments.description: At just 19 years old, Nadal claimed his first Roland Garros title without dropping a set through most of the tournament, announcing his dominance on clay to the world.

tournaments.title: Roland Garros
tournaments.description: Considered by many the greatest clay-court performance ever. Nadal demolished Federer in straight sets in one of the most lopsided Grand Slam finals in history.

tournaments.title: Wimbledon
tournaments.description: Often called the greatest tennis match ever played. After an epic five-set battle under fading light, Nadal ended Federer's six-year Wimbledon reign.

tournaments.title: US Open
tournaments.description: Completing the Career Grand Slam, Nadal conquered Flushing Meadows to become just the seventh player in history to win all four majors.

tournaments.title: Australian Open
tournaments.description: In an emotionally charged final, Nadal overcame a tearful Federer in five sets to claim his first Australian Open and complete all four Grand Slams.

tournaments.title: Monte-Carlo Masters
tournaments.description: Nadal claimed his record eighth Monte-Carlo title with a dominant performance, reaffirming his status as the undisputed King of Clay on the Riviera.

tournaments.title: Barcelona Open
tournaments.description: In his home country, Nadal lifted his record 12th Barcelona title, cementing his legendary bond with Spanish clay and the adoring local crowd.

tournaments.title: Olympic Games
tournaments.description: Representing Spain at the Beijing Olympics, Nadal secured gold without losing a single set in the entire tournament, a defining moment of national pride.

tournaments.title: Roland Garros
tournaments.description: Despite battling a chronic foot injury, Nadal won his 14th Roland Garros and 22nd Grand Slam, further extending his all-time record in a breathtaking display.

tournaments.title: Madrid Open
tournaments.description: On home soil in the Spanish capital, Nadal secured his fifth Madrid Open title in a tight two-set final against rising star Dominic Thiem, fuelled by a passionate crowd.
